id.description: The identifier of the settlement transaction.

settlementDatetime.description: The date and time the units were settled and shares were delivered.

settledQuantity.description: The number of shares actually delivered to the holder, net of shares withheld for tax obligations.

withheldQuantity.description: The number of shares withheld by the issuer to cover tax obligations.

resultingSecurityId.description: The identifier of the security produced as a result of the settlement.

resultingSecurityType.description: The type of the security produced as a result of the settlement (e.g. "certificate").

resultingSecurityLabel.description: The human-readable label of the security produced as a result of the settlement (e.g. "CS-55").

schema_def.description: A settlement transaction for an RSU award. Represents the conversion of vested units into shares.
